title: Polly Wolly Doodle
description: Polly Wolly Doodle candidate generated from a MusicXML ingest draft for runtime compatibility testing.
lyrics: Oh I went down south for to see my Sal sing ing
Pol ly Wol ly Doo dle all the day my _ Sal ly is a _ spunk y gal sing
Pol ly Wol ly Dood le all the day Fare thee well fare thee well fare thee
well my fair y fay for I'm goin' to Lou 'si an a for to
see my Sus y an na sing ing Pol ly Wol ly Doo dle all the day.
